title: Streaming Events, Accessible Status, Cancellation, Reconnect, and Rendering
description: Token deltas overwrite tool status, every chunk is announced, focus jumps, cancel is mouse-only, reconnect duplicates output, and color is the only failure signal. Learners cumulatively produce accessible typed agent event stream through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define typed lifecycle, model delta, tool request, approval, tool progress, result, warning, error, terminal, and usage events with stable identity.
Assemble ordered deltas and state snapshots idempotently while preserving call, interaction, retry, and terminal boundaries.
Announce meaningful milestones through restrained live regions, expose structured text, keep headings and focus stable, and avoid color-only meaning.
